reviews.comment:
Pocos playeros. Siempre hay colas de autos.

(Translated by Google)
Few beachgoers. There are always lines of cars.

reviews.comment:
Pago con la app de YPF y el playero Javier me manifiesta que no me puede hacer factura en A por qué pago con la aplicación !! Rarooooo !!!

(Translated by Google)
I paid with the YPF app and the gas station attendant Javier told me he couldn't give me an invoice because I paid with the app!! Weird!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcVplWC1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tiene todo lo de una estación a aveces hay que esperar un rato para cargar combustible pero Bueeeee

(Translated by Google)
It has everything a station has, sometimes you have to wait a while to refuel, but oh well.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtc2Zxd2hRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y rapidez. Excelente trato del personal para con el cliente. Altamente recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Excellent and fast service. Excellent customer service from the staff. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtb2F1SFFBEAE

reviews.comment:
Poco personal en temporada para tanto caudal de turismo
Siempre largas colas de vehículos para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
Insufficient staff during peak season for the high volume of tourists. Always long lines of vehicles waiting to refuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtOU16UWdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un poco incómodo para ingresar, pero muy buena la atención del personal.

(Translated by Google)
A little awkward to get in, but the staff were very helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtd2UtQTl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar y aunque como es una de las únicas 2 estaciones de servicio de la ciudad de Miramar, hay que hacer cola para cargar combustible, pero la atención de los playeros es muy buena y ágil.
Sólo que las computadoras no están programadas para poder escanear el pago y a la vez entregar factura A y tampoco funciona el expendedor de aire para las gomas.

(Translated by Google)
A very good place, and although, being one of only two gas stations in the city of Miramar, you have to wait in line to fill up, the service from the attendants is very good and efficient. However, the computers aren't programmed to scan the payment and issue a receipt, and the tire inflation pump isn't working either.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtd2ZQcmF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente ubicación.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent location.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtZ2FYbnN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
No tienen ni para inflar una goma

(Translated by Google)
They don't even have enough to inflate a tire
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtX3BTTFN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lenta la atención, 10 am y un solo bombero atendiendo, los otros por ahí sin atender la cola de autos. Delante mío 4 autos y desde que llegué hasta que me fui más de 30 minutos

(Translated by Google)
The service was incredibly slow. It was 10 am and only one firefighter was working; the others were just standing around ignoring the line of cars. There were four cars ahead of me, and it took over 30 minutes from when I arrived until I left.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdnYyaml3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La verdad muy desagradable sentarse a tomar un café y que las moscas estén en toda la cafetería. No se que pasa, nunca visto en ningún YPF ACA solo en éste. Quizás sea una costumbre de la ciudad, en la entrada de la misma se ven bolsas de basura en varios sectores. Miramar muy lindo lastima ese asunto

(Translated by Google)
It's really unpleasant to sit down for a coffee and have flies all over the café. I don't know what's going on; I've never seen this at any other YPF ACA station, only this one. Perhaps it's a common problem in the city; you see garbage bags in several places near the entrance. Miramar is very beautiful, it's a shame about this issue.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcnF1NHd3RRAB
